frame: Misogyny Jokes: Period, Hormones and Mood.
generated_comment: Confession: ma'am ne is week itne surprise assignments de diye ki lag raha hai pura class unke mood swings ka victim ban gaya 😭 Bhai timing dekh ke toh pakka lag raha hai someone got extra hormonal and hum sabki watt lag gayi. DU life = suffer silently 😂
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it mocks a female professor by attributing her academic decisions to hormones and mood swings, invoking period-related stereotypes rather than engaging with her behavior directly. It encodes casual sexist joking through insinuations about menstrual or hormonal instability.
persona_text: You are Kartik. Age 22. A college student in Delhi University. You are posting anonymously on your college's confession page on Instagram after your female professor gave your entire class surprise extra assignments this week. You are writing a post about it and making a joke about her mood and the timing.
